Remote global
danilorojas.design hola@danilorojas.design linkedin.com/in/mdanilorojas github.com/mdanilorojas Quito · Ecuador
Summary
I design software products for complex, regulated environments. Senior UX judgment and user psychology that drives the metrics — system design to align complex architectures into frictionless experiences, with AI-augmented research as leverage.

Skills

SKILLS // mastered
Product & UXUser Research · Usability Testing · Journey Mapping · NPS/CSAT
Design SystemsFigma · Shadcn · Radix · Storybook · WCAG 2.2 / Section 508
Design EngineeringTypeScript · React 19 · Prototyping · Supabase
Agentic UX / AIAgent-ready Design Systems · LLM Persona Emulation · Custom MCP Design

Experience

EXP // selected
2022—NOW
Booz Allen HamiltonArmy · DoD · VA · FAA
Senior Product Designer (Design-Engineering)
Lead product designer for the federal Trusted Environments platform and Developer Portal, architecting two design systems (Shadcn, Radix, BAH Brand Book) compliant with WCAG 2.2 and Section 508 — passing 95%+ of automated accessibility checks. Pioneered agentic UX research: built LLM-based persona emulators to run moderated usability tests (5 users per feature), with 92% rating resulting improvements better; implemented NPS and CSAT to measure release impact. Delivered near-production-ready React components and interaction specs, reducing the design-to-dev cycle from ~6 weeks to under 1 week. Designed a custom MCP for developers; the design system scaled from 0 to 26 internal teams, including the Vellox Reverser cybersecurity product.
2026—NOW
Compliance SaaS · LATAM280+ paying users
Lead Product Designer
Lead product designer for a compliance SaaS for LATAM SMBs, owning discovery-to-launch design and shipping a validated MVP in 40 days. Designed a 31-component Figma (Variables, Auto Layout) design system used across 16 screens, implemented directly in React 19/TypeScript. Instrumented product analytics in Mixpanel, defining the activation metric; onboarding redesign raised new-user activation from 2.6% to 9.4% in under 3 weeks. A/B tested registration (Google sign-in vs. email); Google sign-in won, improving onboarding completion 74%. Ran AI-persona feedback loops to validate flows pre-engineering, growing the product to ~280 paying customers on a base of ~2,700 total users.
2016—2022
Xentinels DesignOps
Design Director / Product Manager
Directed the DesignOps unit, scaling distributed, multi-theme design systems (Ant Design, Material UI, IBM Carbon, and a custom Shadcn-based system for Banco Pichincha) across Fortune 500 clients (Merck, Mondelēz, Banco Pichincha). Led qualitative research (100+ interviews, usability testing, card sorting) to define enterprise interaction patterns, and mentored ~12 junior/mid designers. Streamlined design-to-engineering handoff, cutting time-to-market 35%.
